challenge.title: Korak 14
challenge.description:
Kada ima dovoljno saksija za prodaju, morate ažurirati katalog oduzimanjem saksija navedene veličine. U tom slučaju, vratite Catalog successfully updated.

Izmenite svoju funkciju kako biste to postigli. Zatim, ažurirajte poziv vaše funkcije prosleđujući 10 kao treći argument umesto 25.

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should have only one sellPlants call in your code.
sellPlants(ballerina, "small", 25) should return Not enough small size pots for Lavandula stoechas 'Ballerina'. Only 10 left.
tests.testString:
assert.equal(sellPlants(ballerina, "small", 25), "Not enough small size pots for Lavandula stoechas 'Ballerina'. Only 10 left.")

// prevent hardcoding
assert.equal(sellPlants(hidcote, "large", 95), "Not enough large size pots for Lavandula angustifolia 'Hidcote'. Only 18 left.")
assert.equal(sellPlants(royalCrown, "medium", 95), "Not enough medium size pots for Lavandula dentata 'Royal Crown'. Only 22 left.")

tests.text: sellPlants(ballerina, "small", 10) should return Catalog successfully updated. and subtract 10 from the small property of the object associated with the ballerina key in the catalog.
You should not directly modify the key-value pairs inserted in your catalog map.

challengeFiles.name: script
